Careers at Cascadia Seaweed

Thank you for your interest in Cascadia Seaweed!

Our head office is located in the picturesque town of Sidney by the Sea, situated within the traditional territory of the W̱SÁNEĆ People on the southern tip of Vancouver Island, just a 20-minute drive from Victoria, the capital city of British Columbia. Sidney is just minutes from the BC Ferry Terminal in Swartz Bay and the Victoria International Airport. We also have a facility in Port Alberni on Vancouver Island, and we are establishing a Northern Hub in Prince Rupert, BC.

We are committed to creating and supporting a diverse team that reflects our communities, and we are proud to be certified as a Living Wage Employer with Living Wage for Families BC.

Our team continues to grow and current openings will be posted as they are available. If you have a skill set that you think we should know about, please feel free to contact us.

Cascadia wishes to thank all applicants for their interest and advises that only those candidates selected for an interview will be contacted.

Available Positions
